evidence_used: alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews (low volume, max 7 views)
sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst ratings (1 Buy, no recent changes)
evidence_missing: detailed narrative analysis of catalyst credibility
community attention metrics (Reddit, social signals not evaluated)
baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: ARBB exhibits a sharp 5-day rally (+23.8%) on elevated volume (3.13x 20d avg) following a $45M AI server order announcement (2025-03-04). However, the company is deeply unprofitable (Q2 2025: -$27.5M net loss, -36% net margin), trades at negative PE, and has minimal analyst coverage (1 Buy rating, stale). The $45M order claim lacks primary-source corroboration—information_integrity_assessment flags low_tier_only sources and uncorroborated status. Alternative data is sparse (Wikipedia pageviews max 7 views, GitHub unmapped, SEC 13F unavailable). Macro regime is restrictive (overheat, stress_score=2), disfavoring speculative equity. The surge in price and volume is consistent with retail/meme attention on an AI narrative, but without external verification of the order, fundamental deterioration, and missing alt-data corroboration, confidence is too low to initiate either a short or long position. Fail-closed to no_trade pending better evidence.
invalidation_conditions: If $45M order is verified by independent source (SEC filing, customer press release, earnings call), thesis shifts to potential quality_long candidate
If short-squeeze risk is confirmed (high short interest, low float), surge_short sleeve becomes ineligible
If macro regime shifts to risk-on, equity allocation cap increases, enabling higher position sizes
If alternative_data adapters deliver corroborating evidence (GitHub activity, insider buying, institutional sponsorship), confidence increases
risk_flags: Unverified catalyst: $45M order claim lacks primary-source confirmation
Information integrity veto: low_tier_only sources, uncorroborated status
Fundamental deterioration: negative earnings, negative margins, negative ROA/ROE
Valuation distortion: negative PE, TTM ratios not PIT-safe
Macro headwind: Overheat regime with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline
Retail/meme attention risk: sharp price spike, elevated volume, minimal analyst coverage
Missing corroboration: GitHub unmapped, SEC 13F unavailable, Form 4 no recent activity
Analyst coverage gap: only 1 Buy rating, no recent updates
Alternative data sparse: Wikipedia pageviews negligible, sentiment data stale (Nov 2024)
suggested_improvements: Obtain SEC 8-K or customer press release confirming $45M order details
Cross-check order claim with industry databases or customer announcements
Await next earnings call for management commentary on order pipeline
Monitor insider Form 4 filings for executive buying/selling signals
Collect GitHub activity if ARBB has public repositories (currently unmapped)
Re-evaluate once institutional ownership data becomes available (13F lag)
Assess short interest and float to rule out squeeze risk before surge_short consideration

data_quality_flags.detail: news_event_summary: $45M order claim from single source (GlobeNewswire); no SEC filing, customer confirmation, or independent corroboration
alternative_data_features: GitHub unmapped (error), SEC 13F not_available_on_current_plan, retail_meme_attention not_evaluated
valuation_snapshot: TTM ratios (PE, PB, EV/EBITDA) not anchored to fiscal period; DCF display-only, not PIT-safe
sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: fmp_sentiment data as_of 2024-11-01 (4+ months old); ownership_positioning not_evaluated
filing_confirmation: no 8-K in last 90 days; sec_form4 no recent insider activity
price_snapshot: live quote 2026-05-07T20:00:01+00:00 is after allowed_data_cutoff; using last_eod_close 7.8 (2025-03-04)

baseline_solo.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: narrative_price_gap_assessment is not_evaluated (pending Agent 03 LLM reasoning); filing_confirmation relies on sec_edgar adapter which returned 0 rows; alternative_data_features adapters mostly not_connected or failed; sentiment_community_ownership_evidence is a placeholder with no live ownership data. These gaps prevent full corroboration of the catalyst claim.
recommended_followups: Wait for next earnings release (no upcoming earnings in calendar) to validate $45M order claim
Monitor SEC EDGAR for 8-K or 10-Q/10-K amendments disclosing the order
Check customer (Gajah Kapitalan Sdn Bhd) press releases or investor relations for independent confirmation
Re-run analysis once alternative_data adapters are fully wired (GitHub, SEC 13F, Form 4)
Reassess macro regime if Fed signals pivot away from restrictive policy
Collect institutional ownership data (13F) once available with acceptable PIT lag
baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence to initiate position. Catalyst ($45M order) is unverified and sourced from low-tier only (T3/T4) outlets with no primary-source corroboration. Information integrity assessment flags uncorroborated status and disallows use as primary signal. Fundamental deterioration (negative earnings, margins, ROA/ROE) and macro headwind (Overheat regime, strict_quality_and_valuation_caution) disfavor both long and short. Alternative data sparse and mostly unavailable. Fail-closed pending better evidence.
risk_notes: Catalyst unverified: $45M order claim lacks SEC filing, customer press release, or independent confirmation
Information integrity veto tripped: low_tier_only sources, uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false
Fundamental deterioration: Q2 2025 net loss -$27.5M (-36% margin), negative ROA/ROE, negative PE
Valuation distortion: TTM ratios not PIT-safe, DCF display-only, cannot rely on valuation inputs for decision
Macro headwind: Overheat regime with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline; equity_allocation_cap=20%
Retail/meme attention risk: sharp 5d rally (+23.8%), elevated volume (3.13x), minimal analyst coverage (1 Buy), Wikipedia pageviews negligible
Missing corroboration: GitHub unmapped, SEC 13F unavailable, Form 4 no recent activity, sentiment data stale (Nov 2024)
Surge_short ineligible: no evidence of short-squeeze risk, no hard short thesis without verified catalyst
Quality_long ineligible: unprofitable, deteriorating fundamentals, unverified catalyst, low analyst coverage
Alternative data gap: retail_meme_attention not_evaluated, valuation_context not_evaluated, ownership_positioning not_evaluated

rule_engine_path: 2. Evaluate macro_regime: Overheat / Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2) → equity_discipline=strict_quality_and_valuation_caution, equity_allocation_cap=20%
3. Assess catalyst (news_event_summary): $45M AI server order (2025-03-04) → positive sentiment, but source=GlobeNewswire (T3/T4), no primary-source confirmation
4. Check information_integrity_assessment: low_tier_only (T3=1, T4=2), uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false → information_integrity_veto TRIPPED

5. Evaluate alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews negligible (max 7 views), GitHub unmapped, SEC 13F unavailable, retail_meme_attention not_evaluated → alt_data_sparse, insufficient_evidence TRIPPED
6. Assess fundamentals: Q2 2025 revenue $82.65M, net loss -$27.5M, net_margin -36%, ROA -34%, ROE -33%, PE negative → deterioration, unprofitable
7. Evaluate valuation: PE negative, PB 0.167, EV/EBITDA 0.050, TTM ratios not_PIT_safe, DCF display-only → valuation distorted, cannot rely
8. Check sentiment/ownership: fmp_sentiment stale (Nov 2024), ownership_positioning not_evaluated, sec_form4 no recent activity → missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance TRIPPED
9. Assess price action: 5d return +23.8%, relative_volume 3.13x, trigger_day_open 13.3 vs current 7.8 → retail/meme attention risk, but unverified catalyst
10. Evaluate sleeve eligibility: surge_short requires verified short thesis (not present); quality_long requires profitability + analyst support (not present) → both ineligible
11. Veto summary: insufficient_evidence=true, information_integrity_veto=true, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0
decision_log: T0: Envelope check — PIT-safe, lookahead_safe=true, no post-cutoff data used
T1: Macro regime assessment — Overheat / Moderately Restrictive, strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline, 20% equity cap
T2: Catalyst identification — $45M AI server order (2025-03-04, GlobeNewswire) → positive sentiment, but low-tier source
T3: Information integrity check — low_tier_only (T3=1, T4=2), uncorroborated, use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false → VETO TRIPPED
T4: Alternative data verification — Wikipedia pageviews sparse, GitHub unmapped, SEC 13F unavailable, retail_meme_attention not_evaluated → insufficient_evidence TRIPPED
T5: Fundamental analysis — Q2 2025: revenue $82.65M, net loss -$27.5M, net_margin -36%, ROA -34%, ROE -33%, PE negative → deterioration, unprofitable
T6: Valuation assessment — PE negative, PB 0.167, EV/EBITDA 0.050, TTM not_PIT_safe, DCF display-only → distorted, unreliable
T7: Sentiment/ownership review — fmp_sentiment stale (Nov 2024), ownership_positioning not_evaluated, Form 4 no recent activity → missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance TRIPPED
T8: Price action context — 5d return +23.8%, relative_volume 3.13x, trigger_day_open 13.3 vs 7.8 → consistent with retail/meme attention, but unverified catalyst
T9: Sleeve eligibility — surge_short requires verified short thesis (absent); quality_long requires profitability + analyst support (absent) → both ineligible

T10: Final decision — three vetos tripped (insufficient_evidence, information_integrity_veto, missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance) → decision=no_trade, position_size_pct=0.0, immutable_decision_flag=true
baseline_solo.community_attention_risk_note: Wikipedia pageviews negligible (max 7 views in 30d window); retail_meme_attention not_evaluated; no abnormal_attention_flag; price spike (+23.8% in 5d) and elevated volume (3.13x) suggest retail interest, but unverified catalyst limits confidence

Essential corroboration blocks absent; fail-closed per §13.6 null-block-handling and §13.4 fail-closed clause.
